cleavage agent: the three samples were incubated with trypsin
collision energy: using HCD at collision energy settings of 30
fragmentation method: using HCD at collision energy settings of 30
instrument: using a Q Exactive HF-X Quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: using an Electronspray Ion Source Time-Of-Flight (ESI-TOF) mass spectrometer
labeling: allowing more detailed hydrolytic data of the MdpS activity toward MUC5B from whole saliva
